seasons.name: Spring
seasons.text: Tulips, peonies, ranunculus, sweet peas, irises, hellebores

seasons.name: Summer
seasons.text: Sunflowers, zinnias, dahlias, lisianthus, cosmos, snapdragons

seasons.name: Autumn
seasons.text: Marigolds, chrysanthemums, celosia, asters, dahlias, amaranth

seasons.name: Winter
seasons.text: Dried arrangements, preserved stems, evergreen accents

varieties.name: Dahlias
varieties.desc: Our signature bloom — grown in dozens of varieties from dinner-plate to pompom, in every color of the season.

varieties.name: Garden Roses
varieties.desc: Lush, fragrant garden roses available in blush, cream, and peach tones.

varieties.name: Lisianthus
varieties.desc: Ruffled blooms that mimic peonies — elegant and long-lasting.

varieties.name: Hydrangea
varieties.desc: Full, cloud-like heads in blue, white, and blush — perfect for volume.

varieties.name: Delphinium
varieties.desc: Tall spires of blue and purple that add height and drama.

varieties.name: Stock & Snapdragons
varieties.desc: Fragrant, textural stems grown in pink, white, peach, and purple.

varieties.name: Cosmos
varieties.desc: Airy, wildflower-like blooms in white and pink that bring movement.

varieties.name: Zinnias
varieties.desc: Bold, cheerful color from deep orange to soft pink — summer at its best.

varieties.name: Peonies
varieties.desc: A spring favorite: full, fragrant, and irresistibly romantic.

varieties.name: Tulips & Irises
varieties.desc: Fresh spring options in yellow, purple, white, and pink.

varieties.name: Foliage & Greenery
varieties.desc: Ferns, olive branches, ruscus, basil, and seasonal foliage for lush, natural arrangements.

varieties.name: Dried & Seasonal
varieties.desc: Pampas grass, amaranth, dried seed heads, and autumn leaves for textural accents.
